Localization.Description: A SIM card is replaced on a device

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The SIM card with number {datafield8} on device {datafield3} (SN: {datafield4}, IMEI: {datafield1}, UDID: {datafield2}, OS: {datafield6} {datafield5}) of user {subject.account.fullname} is replaced on host {event_src.host}
